form.formComment: Returns from a 31-day let-up. Most recently won by 2.5 len at Parx March 9 over 1207m defeating Sister Eve with 55.5kg at $4.70. The race before that ran last of 7 at Parx on February 4 over 1207m, 32 len behind Miss Easy carrying 55.5kg at $4.50. Big chance to go back-to-back.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2.5). Returns from a 31-day let-up. Most recently won by 2.5 len at Parx March 9 over 1207m defeating Sister Eve with 55.5kg at $4.70. The race before that ran last of 7 at Parx on February 4 over 1207m, 32 len behind Miss Easy carrying 55.5kg at $4.50. Big chance to go back-to-back.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Last start 2nd in a small field at Aqueduct on March 22 over 1207m, 2.5 len behind Carolina Smokeshow carrying 57kg at $6.48. The start before that 2nd in a small field at Aqueduct on March 1 over 1308m, 2.5 len behind Mezcalifornia carrying 56kg at $4.93. Genuine hope on best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-1.5). Racing well recently. Last start 2nd in a small field at Aqueduct on March 22 over 1207m, 2.5 len behind Carolina Smokeshow carrying 57kg at $6.48. The start before that 2nd in a small field at Aqueduct on March 1 over 1308m, 2.5 len behind Mezcalifornia carrying 56kg at $4.93. Genuine hope on best form.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months eased back early on 3rd in a small field at this track on April 1 over 1207m, 9 len behind Joyous Song carrying 55.5kg at $14.30. Previously second-up 7th of 9 at Tampa Bay Downs Turf on March 9 2025 over 1609m, 4 len behind Das Ist Alles Ally carrying 55.5kg at $4.30. Fitter but others appeal more.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2.5). Second run back. form.formComment: Dual acceptor. At the latest run 2nd of 9 at Turfway Park on March 20 over 1308m, 0.8 len behind Couldyoubeloved carrying 53.5kg at $16.58. The race before that ran on from midfield and won by 2.5 len at Turfway Park February 11 over 1207m defeating Miss Queue with 54.5kg at $4.73. Needs to improve to trouble the top handful.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. First-up 3rd in a small field at Parx on March 5 over 1308m, 15 len behind Divine Seeker carrying 54kg at $6.90. Second-up ran last in a small field at this track on April 1 over 1673m, 18 len behind Shirl's Delight carrying 54kg at $3.70. Promising galloper. Should go well.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up 3rd of 7 at Laurel on February 22 over 1408m, 3.5 len behind Phlying Phyllis with 56kg at $4.90. Second-up 5th of 11 at Turfway Park on March 11 over 1207m, 4 len behind Slang carrying 56kg at $11.57. Strong winning hope.

form.formComment: Last start 7th of 9 at Parx on March 12 over 1308m, 13 len behind Missy Sixtysix with 55.5kg at $22.40. The start before that 2nd in a small field at Parx on January 12 over 1308m, 1.75 len behind Ringer Card carrying 56.5kg at $6.50. Can do a lot better than that last run.
